decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_layout: card-style — hero content inside a floating card/panel
hero_headline_scale: mixed — huge first name, smaller subtitle underneath
nav_style: inline in hero — no separate nav bar, links inside hero
scroll_animation: none — everything static and immediately visible
hover_effects: subtle — slight lift or color shift on cards
contact_style: big bold email as hero text
spacing_density: ultra-spacious — luxury feel, huge gaps between sections
quirk: project cards are arranged in a diagonal / staggered grid
bonus_quirk: add a subtle scanline/CRT effect over the hero section
